---
title: Sunwoo Kwak
linestretch: 2
---

### About Me

I am currently a Master's student in Political Science at **Yonsei University** (Seoul, South Korea).

I will be joining **Princeton University** as a Ph.D. student in the Department of Politics, starting in August 2026.

---


My research interests include: 

- **American Politics** and **Congress**
- **Comparative Politics** and **Legislative Institutions**
- **Elections** and **Public Opinion**

---

So far, my research has been published in *[Legislative Studies Quarterly](https://doi.org/10.1111/lsq.70072)*, as well as in journals in Korean.

### CV
- [click this link to download my CV](cv.html)

### Contacts
- Email: [sunwookwak@yonsei.ac.kr](mailto:sunwookwak@yonsei.ac.kr) or [sk2195@princeton.edu](mailto:sk2195@princeton.edu)
- Google Scholar: [Sunwoo Kwak](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=c22rzSYAAAAJ&hl=en)
